name: Sausage Cabbage Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the Italian sausage in a large pot.
2. Add 1-2 diced onions and 1 clove of diced garlic to the pot.
3. Pour in spaghetti sauce (about 1 cup) and water (approximately 4 cups).
4. Stir in 1 bouillon cube, adjusting based on the size of your jar of spaghetti sauce.
5. Add sliced zucchini and sliced cabbage.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and let it simmer until the cabbage is tender.
7. Taste the soup and add more water if the tomato flavor is too strong.
8. Serve with freshly grated Parmesan or Romano cheese.
